case_title: CHRISTIAN HOUSTON-FLOYD ET AL VS. PETER HAMLETT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,680.00 FILED BY HOUSTON-FLOYD, CHRISTIAN FOX, IAN AS TO DEFENDANT HAMLETT, PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSTON-FLOYD, CHRISTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMLETT, PETER $7,364.00 PRINCIPAL, $201.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,565.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN HOUSTON-FLOYD ONLY. THE COURT IS SATISFIED WITH THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED SHOWING ASAF ANTONIR, ALEX TRIANA, AND ANNA HE WAIVED THEIR CLAIM TO THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. CLAIM OF IAN FOX IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE JUL-14-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(IAN FOX)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HAMLETT, PETER
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-21-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-15-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLAIM LYNN. PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN HOUSTON-FLOYD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IAN FOX IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PETER HAMLETT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-15-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAMLETT, PETER
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE THE BE HEARD BEFORE A JPT FILED BY HOUSTON-FLOYD, CHRISTIAN FOX, IAN HAMLETT, PETER
